steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$f(x) = (2x - 20)(2x + 8)$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is $-196$.

steps.title: Find vertex x from midpoint of zeros
Evaluate f(3) to get minimum
steps.content: $f(3)=(2(3)-20)(2(3)+8)=(-14)(14)=-196$. The computed minimum is −196, matching the source choice value.
